description: Passive rules fire automatically via _passive-activator.sh (PreToolUse hook). Add rules with /evolve → [R]. Each rule has a trigger (regex on tool+input) and an inject message.

rules.inject: Verify .env* is in .gitignore. NEVER commit secrets or API keys.
Generate an HTML version of this deliverable for easy sharing and preview.
Before committing: verify lint/build passes, check for debug logs, use conventional commit format.

rules.trigger: from now on|no longer use|switching to|always use|never use
rules.inject: Capture this as a strategic decision in _operator-state.json with date and reason.
Verify security headers are configured: X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy.
API routes must validate authentication. Never return data without verifying the caller's identity.

note: Rules load via _passive-activator.sh hook in settings.json. Only matching rules are injected (~20-80 tokens per tool use). Add more rules with /evolve → [R].
